query: SELECT id, name, unit, ROUND(purchaseAmount, 2) as purchaseAmt, ROUND(lastCost, 4) as lastCost, ROUND(avgCost, 4) as avgCost, ROUND(costPerUsableUnit, 4) as costPerUsable, ROUND(yieldPercent, 2) as yieldPct FROM inventoryItems WHERE isActive = 1 AND lastCost > 0 ORDER BY name LIMIT 20;
